commands.title: Stellar: Run Tests with AI Fix
Unit Tests
commands.description:
Run all unit tests in the project.

Configuration: Set your model and API keys in the .env file. For OpenAI, set OPENAI_API_KEY. For Mistral, set MISTRAL_API_KEY. For Pinecone, set PINECONE_API_KEY, PINECONE_ENVIRONMENT, and PINECONE_INDEX.

commands.title: Property Tests
commands.description:
Run property-based tests to check invariants.

Configuration: See .env for model and API setup.

commands.title: End-to-End Tests
commands.description:
Run end-to-end integration tests.

Configuration: Ensure all API keys are set in .env.

commands.title: Fuzz Tests
commands.description:
Run fuzz tests for random input coverage.

Configuration: Requires model and Pinecone API keys in .env.

commands.title: Snapshot Tests
commands.description:
Run snapshot tests to detect UI or output changes.

Configuration: Set up model and API keys in .env.

commands.title: Assertion & Invariant Tests
commands.description:
Run assertion and invariant checks.

Configuration: See .env for model/API setup.

commands.title: Runtime Check Tests
commands.description:
Run runtime checks for errors and exceptions.

Configuration: Ensure .env is configured for models/APIs.

commands.title: Differential Tests
commands.description:
Run differential tests to compare outputs.

Configuration: Set model and API keys in .env.

commands.title: Formal Verification Tests
commands.description:
Run formal verification on code.

Configuration: Requires model and Pinecone API keys in .env.

commands.title: Test Data Management Tests
commands.description:
Run tests for test data management.

Configuration: Set up all required API keys in .env.

commands.title: Mock & Isolation Tests
commands.description:
Run mock and isolation tests.

Configuration: See .env for model/API setup.

commands.title: All Tests
commands.description:
Run all available test modules.

Configuration: Ensure all model and API keys are set in .env.

commands.title: Test Options
commands.description:
Show test options and configuration help.

Configuration: Edit .env to set model and API keys.

stellarDebugger.mistralApiKey.description: Mistral API Key for AI-powered error analysis

stellarDebugger.pineconeApiKey.description: Pinecone API Key for test result indexing

stellarDebugger.mistralModel.description: Mistral AI model to use for analysis

scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
